description: Complete node-level lineage graph for the project: a flat edge list plus pre-indexed parent and child adjacency maps.

$schema.description: Relative path to this document's JSON Schema.

children.description: Adjacency map: node id → list of child unique_ids.

edges.description: Directed edges in the node-level DAG.  Each edge is {'source': upstream_id, 'target': downstream_id}.

parents.description: Adjacency map: node id → list of parent unique_ids.

title: dbdocs api/v1/lineage.json
